name: Button
purpose: Primary and secondary call-to-action control for dashboard flows and AI task execution.

structures.name: Text Button
structures.notes: Fully rounded pill action with medium weight label and low visual noise.

structures.name: Icon Leading Button
structures.notes: Used for search, create, or run actions in toolbars.

structures.name: Split Emphasis Row
structures.notes: Primary action carries the accent color, companion action stays quiet.

interactionNotes: Default height should feel compact and suitable for dense work surfaces.
Focus state should emphasize the ring token rather than heavy shadow.
